comment: It was pretty good at first, but now the price is too high. At this price, I can get something far better.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
Avoid at all cost!

This "integration" is the utter most garbage there is. Sloppily created (most likely AI slop), full of bugs, and far behind the CLI version or any other integration for other IDEs.

Does not respect Planning Mode; it will code anyway. Does not respect file system boundaries; it will access everything. Does not work when executing something on a terminal; will say 'program did not answer' while it's still running, and it will not see the terminal's output. Does not respect settings; will choose default garbage GPT model.

DO NOT USE.

comment: Every time I turn around, something has updated and broken. 1.10.0-251 seems to have erased all of the agent customizations that I previously had configured. It doesn't seem to be able to call it's own tools successfully 95% of the time on the first attempt - you ask it to do something and it is just littered with "apply_patch - failed" It is horrifically verbose, which is a problem with the generally janky tool window that it uses in Rider.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: It does not work well for the custom agents e.g. hallucinates when a file read is defined, response failed with too long. I had to use to VS code to run the same prompts and they worked as expected.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: This is an extremely useful code generation plugin. Among all the plugins I have tried, I believe it boasts the best quality, fastest response speed and most reasonable design. I have decided to keep subscribing to it and wish you continued success. Thank you very much for developing this plugin, which has been a tremendous help to me. However, there is one downside: it does not support image uploads to utilize vision capabilities. This has created significant obstacles when I need to upload images to quickly generate reliable UIs or upload architecture diagrams to build frameworks accordingly. Do you have plans to complete this feature?

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: Is still a bit buggy, and the interface isn't always user-friendly. However, it's fully usable for work. And that's the main thing.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: no openai compatible

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: My opinion is that this plugin is simply fantastic, and I wholeheartedly recommend it to anyone who wants code generated on their behalf. It works quickly, is intuitive, and significantly speeds up a developer’s work. The only drawback is the credit limit for users of the free version and the need to purchase a subscription to use it without restrictions. I really wish the plugin had no limits and didn’t reset every 16 days. I appeal to the authors to remove these restrictions so we can use the plugin’s capabilities without interruptions or limitations.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: Latest nightly release has broken plan/agent mode. When in plan mode it continues implementing code without waiting for approval and proper steps.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: Absolutely useless, I'm using remote client from windows to modify files from project on linux. It never worked, currently the AI writes duplicated files on Windows, even though codebase is not there.... It has been broken for almost a year.

comment: I don't understand other comments. This plugin works very well based on my experience. I use it every day and I don't have any major issues. Sometimes I get errors ofc but mostly I know what I'm doing wrong that time so it's easy to change the way.
